title: Linear Search
description: Given an array of n integers and a target value t, find the index (0-based) of the first occurrence of t. If not found, print -1.
inputSpec: First line: n and t. Second line: n integers.
outputSpec: The 0-based index of the first occurrence of t, or -1 if absent.

botCodes.code:
n,t=map(int,input().split())
a=list(map(int,input().split()))
print(a.index(t) if t in a else -1)

let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id and t=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let a=Array.init n(fun _->Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) in let r=ref(-1) in(try Array.iteri(fun i x->if x=t then(r:=i;raise Exit))a with Exit->());Printf.printf"%d\n" !r
